texto: In the minds of some people, writing is one thing, but thinking is quite another. If they define writing as spelling, the production of sentences with random meanings, and punctuation, then they might have a case. But who would accept such a definition? Writing is the production of meaning. Writing is thinking.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de George Hillocks Jr. que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “In the minds of some people, writing is one thing, but thinking is quite another. If they define …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, writing-craft, writing-philosophy, com foco em writing-philosophy.
